messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset. Question asked: How would you assess the risk level of the identified anomalous user activity? Finding to evaluate: departing employee access anomalies warrant immediate credential revocation and forensic evidence preservation Response A: **Risk‑Level Assessment – Anomalous User Activity** | User | Anomalous behaviours observed | Frequency / Scope | Risk rating* | Evidence | |------|------------------------------|-------------------|--------------|----------| | **sbrown** | • Multiple **FILE_SIZE_THRESHOLD** alerts (large .iges and .dwg files) and a **SENSITIVE_KEYWORD_MATCH** on a PDF.
• Repeated **USB_STORAGE** block (09‑04) and **USB_STORAGE** block (09‑02).
• High volume of repo downloads (40 files, 169 MB) and a long VPN session (1.8 h, 161 MB transferred). | 4 DLP alerts across three days, 2 USB blocks, 1 VPN session. | **High** – the combination of large‑file transfers, keyword‑match, and blocked USB devices suggests a possible data‑exfiltration attempt. | DLP alerts: [DLP‑20240902‑1703] & [DLP‑20240902‑4764] ([insider_threat_05_ep_001]); [DLP‑20240904‑3087] ([insider_threat_05_ep_004]); [DLP‑20240905‑2481] & [DLP‑20240905‑9360] ([insider_threat_05_ep_005]).
USB blocks: [USB sbrown 2024‑09‑02T09:03] & [USB sbrown 2024‑09‑04T06:16] ([insider_threat_05_ep_001] & [insider_threat_05_ep_004]).
VPN: [VPN sbrown 19:41‑21:29, 1.8 h] ([insider_threat_05_ep_001]). | | **kwilson** | • **BULK_DOWNLOAD_POLICY** alerts (PDF to local USB, .pdf to SharePoint).
• **FILE_SIZE_THRESHOLD** on a .dwg file.
• Large repo download (13 files, 112 MB) and a 0.8 h VPN session (161 MB transferred). | 3 DLP alerts (two on 09‑03, one on 09‑06) + 1 VPN session. | **Medium‑High** – bulk‑download and external‑transfer policies are being triggered repeatedly, indicating possible staging of data for exfiltration. | DLP alerts: [DLP‑20240903‑9659] & [DLP‑20240903‑1436] ([insider_threat_05_ep_002]); [DLP‑20240906‑3987] ([insider_threat_05_dx_005]).
VPN: [VPN kwilson 19:58‑20:46, 0.8 h] ([insider_threat_05_ep_005]). | | **nwilliams** | • Repeated **FILE_SIZE_THRESHOLD**, **BULK_DOWNLOAD_POLICY**, **SENSITIVE_KEYWORD_MATCH** alerts across 09‑02, 09‑03, 09‑04, 09‑06.
• Consistently accesses multiple high‑value repos (firmware, schematics, RF‑modules).
• VPN sessions lasting 1 Response B: Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording. Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE /no_think
